name: Legal
pageTitle: AI Automation for Legal Firms · Aiprosol
metaDescription: AI automation for law firms: contract review, intake triage, discovery support, client onboarding. 32-45 partner hours/week reclaimed. SOC 2 + DPA ready.

hero.tagline: Reclaim 32-45 partner hours/week. Without the AI-hallucination risk that gets you disbarred.
hero.intro: Most legal AI tools fail because they treat documents like prose. Aiprosol designs workflows around the actual legal stack: matter intake, contract review, discovery support, client comms — with audit trails the bar will accept.

metrics.label: Partner time reclaimed (average across firms ≥ 10 attorneys)
Every AI output logged + reviewable for compliance

useCases.title: Intake triage
useCases.description: New matter request → AI categorise (litigation, transactional, IP, family) → route to right partner → confirmation email + Calendly link in <5 min.

useCases.title: Contract review acceleration
useCases.description: Upload PDF → AI extract material terms (governing law, indemnities, termination, IP, payment) → redline against your playbook → flag for partner sign-off.

useCases.title: Discovery document processing
useCases.description: Bulk PDF ingest → privilege screening (AI) → responsiveness coding (AI + paralegal review) → privilege log generation.

useCases.title: Client onboarding
useCases.description: Engagement letter signed → matter created → Drive folder provisioned → kick-off email sent → 30-day check-in scheduled. Zero manual handoffs.

useCases.title: Email triage
useCases.description: Each inbound email → AI categorise (client / opposing counsel / vendor / court / spam) → label + route. Partners stop drowning in inbox.

compliance: Aiprosol can deploy on customer-controlled cloud (AWS / GCP / Azure). Standard NDA + DPA in template. All AI processing happens in-jurisdiction (US-East / EU-West). Audit logs include every prompt + response + reviewer + timestamp. Compatible with the ABA's Model Rules of Professional Conduct (current guidance on AI assistance).

faqs.q: Won't AI hallucinate citations and get me sanctioned?
faqs.a: Aiprosol workflows are designed so AI never produces a final filing or citation without human review. AI extracts + drafts + flags; a partner approves before anything reaches a court, client, or opposing counsel.

faqs.q: How do you handle privileged communications?
faqs.a: Privileged content runs through customer-controlled infrastructure with no LLM-vendor data retention. We integrate with an LLM-vendor Zero-Data-Retention enterprise tier. Standard MSA includes explicit DPA terms for legal industry.

faqs.q: Can this work alongside our existing matter management system?
faqs.a: Yes — we layer on top of Clio, NetDocuments, iManage, MyCase, PracticePanther via their APIs. We don't replace the system of record; we automate the workflows that live on top of it.

faqs.q: What's the typical engagement?
faqs.a: Discovery call → 30-day pilot on 1 high-value workflow (usually intake or contract review) → full Enterprise plan if pilot delivers reclaim guarantee (35+ hrs/week).

faqs.q: Pricing?
faqs.a: Most firms with 10-50 attorneys land on the Growth plan ($2,997/mo). Firms with 50+ attorneys typically need Enterprise ($7,997/mo) for the volume + compliance scope.

name: Real Estate
pageTitle: AI Automation for Real Estate · Aiprosol
metaDescription: AI automation for real estate brokerages + agencies: sub-3-minute lead response, listing distribution, transaction coordination. Aiprosol manages it for you.

hero.tagline: Respond to inbound leads in under 3 minutes — automatically. Turn 'lost-to-faster-competitor' into 'won by default'.
hero.intro: In real estate, response time is everything. Lead arrives → 3-minute response = 21x more likely to convert. 30-minute response = baseline. 24-hour response = competitor wins. Aiprosol architects the sub-3-minute response system, then operates it for you.

metrics.label: Average value reclaimed from leads previously lost to slow response

useCases.title: Sub-3-minute lead response
useCases.description: Lead from Zillow / Redfin / your website → AI personalised email + SMS in <3 min → Calendly link → agent notified via Slack with hot-lead alert.

useCases.title: Listing distribution
useCases.description: New listing entered → auto-publish to MLS + Zillow + Redfin + brokerage site + Instagram + email blast — with appropriate copy per channel, no manual copy-paste.

useCases.title: Transaction coordination
useCases.description: Under-contract checklist runs itself: inspector booked, attorney notified, lender pinged, milestones tracked, weekly status email auto-generated for buyers + sellers.

useCases.title: After-hours lead capture
useCases.description: Lead arrives at 11pm → AI qualifies + responds + books showing for tomorrow → agent wakes up to a confirmed appointment.

useCases.title: Past-client re-engagement
useCases.description: Quarterly auto-pulse on past clients with personalised market-snapshot email. Referral generation without manual nurturing.

compliance: TCPA-compliant SMS infrastructure (Twilio with proper consent flows). Fair Housing Act compliant copy review (the AI never writes anything that mentions protected classes). NAR Code of Ethics aware.

faqs.q: Will this work with our existing CRM (Follow Up Boss, kvCORE, Boomtown, Sierra)?
faqs.a: Yes — we layer alongside via API. The CRM stays as system of record; Aiprosol automates the workflows on top.

faqs.q: How do you handle TCPA compliance for SMS?
faqs.a: Every contact captures explicit SMS consent at lead form. Unsubscribe links work first-time. All sends logged with timestamp + consent record. Twilio handles carrier-side compliance.

faqs.q: What about Fair Housing — won't AI accidentally write something problematic?
faqs.a: We never let AI write final customer-facing copy without a guardrail. AI drafts + human-reviewed templates approve. Final sends go through a Fair-Housing keyword filter as a second check.

faqs.q: Pricing for a 10-agent brokerage?
faqs.a: Starter plan ($997/mo) covers the sub-3-min response infrastructure + listing distribution. Brokerages above 25 agents typically need Growth ($2,997/mo).

name: Financial Services
pageTitle: AI Automation for Financial Services · Aiprosol
metaDescription: AI automation for accounting firms, wealth managers, and financial advisors: document processing, client communications, regulatory compliance workflows.

hero.tagline: Document processing at 99%+ accuracy with full audit trail. The compliance team will love it.
hero.intro: Financial services run on documents — tax returns, statements, agreements, KYC packets, fund prospectuses. Manual processing is slow, error-prone, and a hiring drag. AI handles 99%+ of the extraction + classification; humans review the edge cases. Audit trail end-to-end.

metrics.label: Every input + extraction + decision + reviewer logged

useCases.title: Document extraction (tax returns, statements, contracts)
useCases.description: Upload PDF → AI extract structured data → push to your ledger/CRM/database → flag anomalies for human review. 100x faster than manual entry.

useCases.title: KYC + onboarding
useCases.description: New client → ID verification + KYC questionnaire + risk scoring + initial portfolio recommendation drafted → advisor reviews + sends. Cycle time 40% lower.

useCases.title: Client quarterly communications
useCases.description: Quarter close → AI generates personalised performance summary per client → advisor reviews + sends. 2-week process becomes 2-day.

useCases.title: Regulatory documentation
useCases.description: Audit + compliance request → AI compile relevant docs + draft response → compliance officer reviews. Cuts response time on regulator requests by 60-70%.

useCases.title: Invoice + AP automation
useCases.description: Vendor invoice → AI extract + categorise + match to PO → push to accounting system + flag exceptions. Eliminates manual AP entry.

compliance: SOC 2 Type II controls architecture. SEC + FINRA aware. Data residency: US-East or EU-West, customer choice. Standard MSA + DPA. Compatible with major custodians (Schwab, Fidelity, Pershing) via Schwab Performance / Black Diamond / Orion APIs.

faqs.q: How do you handle data residency requirements?
faqs.a: Customer-controlled cloud (AWS / GCP / Azure) or our managed deployment in your chosen region. LLM processing happens via an LLM-vendor Zero-Data-Retention tier for sensitive data.

faqs.q: Can the AI handle our custom document types?
faqs.a: Yes — most custom forms train in 50-100 examples. Initial training week sets accuracy; ongoing supervised learning closes accuracy gaps as you go.

faqs.q: What about the audit trail?
faqs.a: Every AI extraction logs: input doc hash, prompt sent, output received, reviewer ID, decision (approve / edit / reject), timestamp. Exportable for any audit.

faqs.q: Pricing for a 25-person advisory firm?
faqs.a: Growth plan ($2,997/mo) is the typical fit — covers document processing + client comms + KYC workflows. Larger firms (50+) move to Enterprise.

name: SaaS
pageTitle: AI Automation for SaaS Companies · Aiprosol
metaDescription: AI automation for SaaS: lead scoring, sub-3-minute response, customer success automation, churn prediction. Run by 10 AI agents.

hero.tagline: We run the same stack we recommend. 10 AI agents operate Aiprosol itself.
hero.intro: SaaS companies don't need PowerPoint frameworks — they need working systems. Aiprosol layers AI into the workflows that move SaaS metrics: lead scoring, MRR expansion, churn prevention, support resolution. Same architecture that runs Aiprosol's own 10-agent C-suite.

metrics.label: Expansion MRR from AI-scored upgrade signals

useCases.title: Product-qualified lead scoring + routing
useCases.description: Trial signups → enrich + score (4-component model: fit, intent, engagement, urgency) → route hot ones to AE in <3 min via Slack.

useCases.title: Expansion MRR signals
useCases.description: Usage data → AI detects expansion triggers (hit user limit, accessed Pro feature, multi-team usage) → CSM auto-pinged with conversation starter.

useCases.title: Churn early-warning
useCases.description: Combine usage trend + sentiment + payment timing → composite churn score → high-risk accounts trigger retention play 60 days before renewal.

useCases.title: Support ticket triage
useCases.description: Inbound ticket → AI categorise (bug / feature request / billing / general) → assign to right pod → suggested-reply draft for the engineer/CS rep.

useCases.title: Customer feedback synthesis
useCases.description: Aggregate support tickets + CSAT + churn-reason data weekly → AI summary of top themes + roadmap recommendations → product team Slack digest.

compliance: GDPR + CCPA standard. SOC 2 Type II architecture. Customer DPA terms. We work with org-owned credentials — Aiprosol never holds your Stripe / Salesforce / HubSpot / AWS keys.

faqs.q: We run on HubSpot — do you displace it?
faqs.a: No. We layer on top via API. HubSpot stays as your system of record; Aiprosol automates the AI-augmented workflows around it.

faqs.q: What's the difference between Aiprosol and a tool like Endgame / Pocus / MadKudu?
faqs.a: Those are point-solutions for one workflow (PQL scoring). Aiprosol is the design + build + operate layer that integrates scoring with response, routing, sequencing, and reporting. We've used / integrated with all the major PQL tools — we can extend whichever you've chosen.

faqs.q: How quickly can you deliver value for a 20-person SaaS?
faqs.a: Phase 0 (Days 0-14): SSO + pilot users + first workflow live (usually PQL scoring). Phase 1 (Days 15-45): 3-5 workflows in production with measurable hours-reclaimed metric.

faqs.q: Pricing?
faqs.a: Growth plan ($2,997/mo) for SaaS in $1M-$10M ARR range. Enterprise ($7,997/mo) for $10M+ ARR with multi-product complexity.

name: Professional Services
pageTitle: AI Automation for Professional Services · Aiprosol
metaDescription: AI automation for consultancies, agencies, accountancies: client comms, project tracking, time capture, proposal generation. Reclaim billable hours.

hero.tagline: Stop billing for admin. Aiprosol automates the workflows that eat 25-35 hrs/week — giving you back capacity to actually deliver client work.
hero.intro: Professional services firms drown in non-billable work: timesheets, status reports, proposal generation, project comms. Most of it is automatable in 2026. Aiprosol designs + runs the automation system that gives your team back the billable hours.

metrics.label: Non-billable admin time reclaimed across project teams
Proposal turnaround (from RFP arrival to signed SOW)
Time entry coverage via AI auto-categorisation

useCases.title: Time tracking auto-capture
useCases.description: Calendar events + Slack activity + git commits → AI infer billable hours per project → suggested timesheet → human approves. No more Friday timesheet panic.

useCases.title: Proposal + SOW generation
useCases.description: Discovery call recorded → AI extract scope + price + timeline → drafted SOW + proposal deck → partner reviews + sends.

useCases.title: Project status reports
useCases.description: Weekly → AI aggregate task tracker + client emails + risk register → status report drafted → PM reviews + sends. 2hr weekly task → 15min.

useCases.title: Client onboarding
useCases.description: Contract signed → engagement letter sent → Drive folder + Notion workspace + Slack channel created → kickoff scheduled → team intros emailed. Zero manual steps.

useCases.title: Knowledge management
useCases.description: Internal Slack + Notion + transcripts → AI index + RAG → internal Q&A: 'how did we solve X last time?' returns cited answer.

compliance: Standard NDA + MSA. Customer-controlled cloud option. Data isolation between client engagements enforced by tag-based access control.

faqs.q: Will the AI replace our junior consultants?
faqs.a: No — it removes the admin work that burns them out. Juniors spend less time on slides + status updates, more on actual analysis. Most firms hire MORE juniors after automation because the unit economics shift.

faqs.q: Can it work with our existing PM stack (Asana / Linear / Monday / ClickUp)?
faqs.a: Yes — we integrate via API. The PM tool stays your system of record; Aiprosol automates flows around it.

faqs.q: Pricing for a 15-person consultancy?
faqs.a: Starter plan ($997/mo) for firms under 10 people; Growth ($2,997/mo) for 10-50; Enterprise ($7,997/mo) above that.

name: E-commerce
metaDescription: AI automation for e-commerce + DTC brands: customer support, abandoned cart, supplier ops, returns workflow. 18-25% revenue lift typical.

hero.tagline: Customer support that resolves 60% of tickets without a human. Cart abandonment sequences that actually convert. Supplier ops that don't eat your weekends.
hero.intro: E-commerce ops eat founder time in three places: customer support, supplier coordination, returns. Aiprosol automates all three with AI that respects your brand voice + your operational reality.

metrics.label: Support tickets resolved without human touch (refunds, tracking, sizing)
Revenue from AI-personalised cart-abandonment + post-purchase flows
Per-ticket cost on customer support after AI triage

useCases.title: Customer support automation
useCases.description: Incoming Shopify / Gorgias / Klaviyo message → AI categorise + draft response → 60% resolve immediately (refund status, tracking, sizing); 40% route to human with context pre-loaded.

useCases.title: Cart abandonment recovery
useCases.description: Abandoned cart → personalised email/SMS sequence based on the actual items + customer history → conversion rate 2-3x vs. generic 'you forgot something' templates.

useCases.title: Supplier order automation
useCases.description: Inventory low-stock alert → AI generate PO + send to supplier + track confirmation → reorder cadence learned from sales velocity per SKU.

useCases.title: Returns workflow
useCases.description: Customer initiates return → AI eligibility check + RMA generation + label issued + refund queued → end-to-end with zero manual intervention for compliant returns.

useCases.title: Post-purchase content
useCases.description: Order ships → AI personalised 'here's how to use it' email per product → review request 14 days post-delivery → re-engagement 60 days later.

compliance: PCI DSS compliant patterns (we never touch payment cards directly). GDPR + CCPA for customer data. Shopify, BigCommerce, WooCommerce, Magento all supported.

faqs.q: Will customers know they're talking to AI?
faqs.a: Our pattern: AI handles the routine query, brands the response as 'AI-assisted', escalates anything edge-case to a human. Most customers prefer instant AI to slow human.

faqs.q: Can it handle our brand voice?
faqs.a: Yes — initial training on 50-100 of your historical messages calibrates voice. Ongoing supervised learning refines as you go.

faqs.q: What about returns fraud?
faqs.a: Returns workflow has explicit fraud-pattern detection. High-value or pattern-matched-fraud returns escalate to human review. Most legitimate returns process automatically.

faqs.q: Pricing for a $5M-$20M revenue DTC brand?
faqs.a: Growth plan ($2,997/mo) for that range. Above $20M revenue → Enterprise ($7,997/mo) for multi-channel scope.
